benchmark_result.review_text: I hired Dane Loizzo as my third attorney during my divorce case. Within just three weeks, Dane racked up over $7,000 in charges, many of which appeared inflated, before withdrawing from my case without achieving any meaningful progress. Dane’s father, Tom Loizzo, is a well-regarded attorney with a strong reputation, and my mother has worked with Tom for decades. However, my experience with Dane was entirely different. He failed to provide value, transparency, or support. Based on my experience, I would not recommend Dane Loizzo for any divorce-related matters.

benchmark_result.review_text: My husband and I both sold and purchased a home simultaneously. We could not have navigated through the legal side of things without the help of Shannon Wynn and staff, at Wynn at Law, LLC. Wynn at Law was with us every step of the way, with ease and genuine concern. They were always available for any questions/concerns we had and they responded very quickly. We recommend Wynn at Law, for expertise, vast legal knowledge, and for a commitment to their clientele that is rare to find today.

benchmark_result.review_text: 4.5 Star Rating! The stars above did not give me that option. The short story is I hired Attorney Mehlos to help me fight a battery charge. The real story is Corey helped me through the worst year of my life. The short: I was being attacked and called the police. When they arrived I did not want the "attacker" arrested, because it was really just an argument that went to far and I was not injured. That being the case I did not say anything other than "Thanks for coming. Everything is okay". Unfortunately the other party was very mad and completely lied to the police and I was arrested. I was innocent and it was frustrating because they also too things that were said completely out of context. From day 1, Attorney Mehlos and I came up with a plan and continued to refine our strategy until the prosecutor dismissed the battery charge, before we were to go to trial. It took 12 months to get it done and it nearly killed me. Obviously there is a lot more to it, but I am not writting a book! LOL There was a lot of back and forth with the Prosecutor Assistant D.A. and the Judges. It was completely overwhelming at times to be an innocent man who has never been convicted of any crime and yet it seemed that everyone except Attorney Mehlos assumed I was guilty. It was comforting to know that Attorney Mehlos was confident and prepared to win at trial. The prosecutor eventually released knowing he’d have a tough case. Yet on multiple occasions Attorney Mehlos told me to trust him and the result was exactly what he predicted. I highly recommend Attorney Mehlos for any criminal case. Sincerely, Jeff R. Brownell Owner & Operator TaskMasters Home Services LLC

…with an absolute domination in the court room. I was found not guilty and cleared overwhelmingly on all charges. This m…

benchmark_result.review_text: In January of 2023, after a 26 year untarnished and successful career as a firefighter/paramedic and 12 years as an adjunct fire instructor, I was falsely accused, charged and arrested for 5 different counts which consisted of both felonies and misdemeanors ranging from 4th degree sexual assault of a child to misconduct in office. During the 5 days I spent in jail, my wife received a recommendation to call attorney Corey Mehlos. That decision turned out to be the one that saved my life both literally and figuratively. The passion, professionalism, determination, dedication and commitment not just from Corey, but his entire staff is second to none. He never gave up on me or my family and after nearly 3 long years, his tireless work ended with an absolute domination in the court room. I was found not guilty and cleared overwhelmingly on all charges. This man is the absolute definition of what a defense attorney should be. He is truly fearless, and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone and every one who finds themself in need of legal assistance. Casper Mehlos law firm is THE REAL DEAL

themes.evidence_span: never really talked to me or updated me much
Truly a disappointing experience
we spent around 15-20 grand
never really did anything towards my son's appeal

benchmark_result.review_text:
I truly wonder if other Black people had great experiences here. They accepted thousands of dollars but never really did anything towards my son's appeal, never really fought. In the beginning, one of the assistant attorneys (maybe even a paralegal, not too sure) that worked the case seemed to be good for a quick sec, but then was transferred or something. The case was transferred to one of the law firm attorneys. I believed he emailed me once, never really talked to me or updated me much. Then the case was given to a younger lady whom handled it until the decision. They never even really had meetings with me or my son. Truly horrible, and adds to how certain persons are treated in this business.

I read the other reviews on how this firm worked with those persons, my family and our case received none of this. I don't even think I ever met with anyone other than the paralegal but we spent around 15-20 grand. Truly a disappointing experience.

benchmark_result.review_text: I’m disappointed in the service provided by Fields Law firm. My son’s appeal was denied and I understand that is how insurance companies work but it was sent directly to the disability provider without our being able to review. Follow-up discussion included a recommendation to go back to settle and waive benefits for life. However, most recently I sent them an email and no response. Then out of the blue they send me an email to which I replied and no response. I’m left wondering if the attorney on our case is even still employed there.

themes.sentence_snippet: …ely, I cannot. As I told my lawyer several times, I was not happy with the outcome. I feel my lawyer was representing th…

benchmark_result.review_text:
I wish I could write a positive review, but unfortunately, I cannot. As I told my lawyer several times, I was not happy with the outcome. I feel my lawyer was representing the defendant instead of me. It seemed that my lawyer was not trying to get me to the best outcome. I spent hours building spreadsheets explaining the way the defendant cost me lifetime money, but my lawyer seemed to ignore my concerns. It was my lawyer who talked me out of going to court before a judge. The final decision was mine based on my lawyer telling to accept the "final offer".

I would not recommend this law firm.
